hypo
  • Installation
  • View page source

Installation

Requirements

  • Python 3.9 or newer

  • NVIDIA GPU

  • A compatible NVIDIA driver

  • PyTorch with CUDA support

Python dependencies

  • “numpy (>=1.26.4)”,

  • “scipy (>=1.7)”,

  • “matplotlib (>=3.5)”,

  • “torch (>=2.0)”,

  • “tqdm (>=4.67.3,<5.0.0)”

Install

Clone the repository and install the package:

git clone https://github.com/XiaodongRencologne/hypo.git
cd hypo
pip install .
